title: elymus farctus
intro: Elymus farctus, also known as the snow growth wheatgrass or snow wheat, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus farctus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Elymus farctus can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and its extracts have also been studied for their potential use in food and cosmetic applications.
